name: Windows Rollback Demo
description: Demonstrates automatic rollback functionality on failure.

tasks.name: Rollback Demo Task
tasks.description: Task representing an operation that will be rolled back.

actions.name: Create temporary file
actions.description: Action 1: Creates a temporary file in the current directory
actions.command: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType File -Path ./spark_rollback_demo.txt -Force | Out-Null; Write-Output 'File created. Waiting before failure...'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3"
actions.rollback_command: powershell -Command "Write-Output 'Sleeping before rollback...'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Remove-Item -Path ./spark_rollback_demo.txt -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Rollback complete.'"

actions.name: Intentional Failure
actions.description: Action 2: Fails intentionally to trigger the rollback of Action 1
